summary: Completed testing of BlackieFi new features: Notifications API, PDF import, code cleanup verification, and README demo credentials. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: login page no longer shows demo credentials, import page accepts both CSV and PDF files.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: API client used undefined 'this.baseUrl' instead of 'API_URL' constant in importCSV and importPDF methods

critical_code_review_comments: All notification endpoints properly implement authentication via get_current_user dependency
PDF import uses PyPDF2 for parsing with proper error handling
Alert service correctly checks budget thresholds, bill reminders, and goal milestones
Email service uses Resend API with proper async handling
AIInsights component correctly checks aiStatus.effective_ai_enabled before rendering
seed_data_creation: Created test.csv and test.pdf import batches during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: Notifications API (GET, unread-count, preferences, check-alerts), PDF import endpoint, code cleanup (no Go files), README with demo credentials. AI Insights component only renders when effective_ai_enabled is true. Email notifications require RESEND_API_KEY to be set.

features_tested.login_page_no_demo_creds: PASS - Login page no longer shows demo credentials
features_tested.import_csv_pdf: PASS - Import page accepts both .csv and .pdf files
features_tested.pdf_endpoint_exists: PASS - POST /api/imports/pdf endpoint exists and works
features_tested.dashboard_ai_disabled: PASS - Dashboard loads without AI Insights when AI is disabled

bugs_fixed.issue: importCSV and importPDF methods used undefined 'this.baseUrl' instead of 'API_URL' constant
